il biais sulle entree sara aggiunto dal nn, no biais su hidden. Check hidden layers. nb_neuronsPerInputs >=4
learning_random_async_update_states_bool: agent's states update management. false: agents are chosen in random grid-positions order, and the updated state value of a chosen agent is used to compute the state of a not yet updated neighbor (realistic robotic setup). true: in grid-positions order, each agent computes its new state using pre-updated neighbors state values, then all new agents states are updated synchronously. In both options, all agents states are updated.
learning_random_init_states_bool info: true: the initial state of each agent is a list of random values (normal distribution in [0,1[ ). false: the initial state of each agent is a fixed vector of init_cell_state_value
learning_with_noise_bool info: Each time a new agent state is computed, a noise N(0, learning_with_noise_std, len_state) is added to its value
